item.title: KOL Views Preview: What do daraxonrasib's Revolution-ary data mean for pancreatic cancer?
item.description: The top-line success of Revolution Medicines' daraxonrasib in the Phase III RASolute 302 trial , where hit its marks this...

item.title: Vital Signs: How GLP-1s are defining the growth profile of major pharma
item.description: The haves and have-nots across major pharma are increasingly divided by whether or not they have an incretin agonist.

item.title: Spotlight On: Daraxonrasib set to revolutionise pancreatic cancer treatment landscape
item.description: One US-based KOL recently described the promise shown by daraxonrasib to FirstWord as "what we’ve been trying to do with pancreatic cancer for decades. It’s thrilling."

item.title: KOL Views Q&A: Lilly’s Foundayo will gain on Novo's Wegovy – but oral GLP-1s face headwinds in obesity
item.description: FirstWord spoke with obesity expert Scott Kahan about US approval of Eli Lilly's Foundayo to treat obesity, and how the competition with Novo's oral Wegovy and other oral GLP-1s is likely to shape up.
